sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Let me check what happens when I rotate the top ring
# The top ring control is at (16, 19)-(19, 21)
# Let me try rotating it once and see what happens

result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 17, 'col': 20}])
print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")
print(f"Done: {last_action_result.get('done')}")
print(f"Board changed: {last_action_result.get('board_changed')}")
print(f"Gameplay changed: {last_action_result.get('gameplay_changed')}")
print(f"No impact: {last_action_result.get('no_impact')}")

# Check all rings
print("\nCurrent middle ring:")
middle_current = {}
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 10 and n['color'] not in ['B', 'c', 'G', 'Y', 'N', 'R']:
        boundary = n['boundary']
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in boundary)
        min_col = min(p[1] for p in boundary)
        if min_row == 26:
            middle_current[min_col] = n['color']
cols = sorted(middle_current.keys())
print(f"  {dict(zip(cols, [middle_current[c] for c in cols]))}")

print("Current bottom ring:")
bottom_current = {}
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 10 and n['color'] not in ['B', 'c', 'G', 'Y', 'N', 'R']:
        boundary = n['boundary']
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in boundary)
        min_col = min(p[1] for p in boundary)
        if min_row == 35:
            bottom_current[min_col] = n['color']
cols = sorted(bottom_current.keys())
print(f"  {dict(zip(cols, [bottom_current[c] for c in cols]))}")

print("Current top ring:")
top_current = {}
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 10 and n['color'] not in ['B', 'c', 'G', 'Y', 'N', 'R']:
        boundary = n['boundary']
        min_row = min(p[0] for p in boundary)
        min_col = min(p[1] for p in boundary)
        if min_row == 17:
            top_current[min_col] = n['color']
cols = sorted(top_current.keys())
print(f"  {dict(zip(cols, [top_current[c] for c in cols]))}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
